overall.description: First-person exploration of a tropical waterfront dock in a video game (Far Cry 6). The player walks along concrete docks past a moored fishing boat, examines the turquoise water and floating buoys, ascends stairs to an upper level, and walks along a promenade where NPCs are fishing and cleaning fish in the bright Caribbean sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete dock area near blue wooden shed

events.description: small wooden fishing boat comes into view in the turquoise water

agents.ego_description: walking along the concrete dock away from the blue wooden shed toward the water

entered.detail: small weathered wooden building with blue painted siding and corrugated metal roof
wide concrete pier with weathered surface and metal railings
tall palm trees lining the rocky hillside in the background
steep rocky terrain with tropical vegetation rising behind the dock
weathered wooden fishing boat moored at the dock with a small cabin

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking away from a blue wooden shed along a concrete dock. The tropical sun illuminates palm trees and a rocky hillside in the background. Around the 4-second mark, a small wooden fishing boat comes into view in the turquoise water ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: dock edge with moored fishing boat

events.description: camera slows and looks down at the wooden boat passing by on the left

agents.ego_description: approaching the moored boat and examining it closely while walking past

entered.detail: heavy rusted metal bollards for tying boats, mounted on the dock edge
clear turquoise harbor water with gentle ripples and reflections

segments.scene_description: The camera moves closer to the moored wooden boat, examining its weathered details and the cargo crate inside. The dock continues alongside the turquoise water, with rusted mooring bollards visible on the right. The surrounding buildings and palm trees fall behind as the focus remains on the boat and water.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront with floating navigation buoys

events.description: camera turns to look along the dock wall at the water and floating buoys

agents.ego_description: walking along the dock edge while looking at the water and floating buoys

entered.detail: small black and white navigation buoy floating in the harbor water
vertical concrete retaining wall with blue painted markings at water level
tree-covered hills across the water with scattered buildings

segments.scene_description: Having passed the boat, the camera continues along the dock edge, panning to look at the turquoise water and a floating navigation buoy. The concrete dock wall shows blue paint markings near the waterline, and the distant forested shoreline is visible across the harbor.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairs and upper dock industrial area

events.description: ascending concrete stairs to return to the upper dock level

agents.ego_description: turning around and climbing the concrete stairs back to the upper dock level

entered.detail: weathered concrete staircase with metal rebar showing on the sides
tall concrete retaining wall with rough texture
the same blue wooden shed now seen from the opposite side
stacked red and green industrial barrels near the wall
warehouse structures with corrugated metal siding in the background

segments.scene_description: The camera turns away from the water and ascends a set of concrete stairs with exposed rebar. At the top, the blue wooden shed reappears from a new angle, alongside industrial barrels and warehouse buildings. The scene transitions from the open waterfront to a more industrial dock area.

events.description: approaching NPC standing with fishing rod by the water edge
reaching the fish cleaning area with woman kneeling on the dock

agents.ego_description: walking along the promenade passing fishermen and approaching the fish cleaning area

notable_agents.action: standing man holding fishing rod by the water, looking out at the harbor
woman kneeling on the dock cleaning and sorting fish into crates

entered.detail: wide paved dock area with bollards and fishing equipment scattered about
wooden crates filled with fresh fish and ice
nets, buckets, and tools used for cleaning fish
large pile of silver fish laid out on a tarp on the concrete

segments.scene_description: The final segment walks along the waterfront promenade where local fishing activity is visible. A man stands fishing by the water's edge, and further along, a woman kneels sorting a large pile of fresh fish on the concrete. Fishing crates and equipment are scattered around as the camera moves through this working dock area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a tropical waterfront that transitions from a quiet dockside view to a bustling industrial fishing promenade. It begins by walking away from a blue wooden shed along a concrete dock, moving toward a weathered wooden fishing boat moored in turquoise water beneath a bright sun. As the camera passes the boat and its cargo, the view pans across the harbor to observe a floating navigation buoy and the distant forested shoreline. The scene then shifts as the camera turns away from the water to ascend concrete stairs with exposed rebar, moving from the open waterfront into an industrial area filled with barrels and warehouse buildings. Finally, the path opens onto a promenade where the camera glides past locals fishing by the edge and a woman sorting a pile of fresh fish amidst scattered crates and equipment.
